name: Vanessa Mdee
description:
'''Vanessa Hau Mdee''' (born 7 June 1988) is a former [[Tanzanian]] recording artist, [[MTV]] [[Video jockey|VJ]], television personality and radio host. She hosted ''Epic Bongo Star Search'' and ''Dume Challenge'' for ITV Tanzania before signing to B'Hits Music Group in late 2012.

In 2015 and 2016, Mdee released three singles ("Nobody But Me," "Never Ever" and "Niroge"). In 2018, she was signed to [[Universal Music Group Nigeria|Universal Music Group]].

During her ''Deep Dive With Vanessa Mdee Podcast'' in 2020, Mdee announced that she was quitting the music industry, citing pressure and depression.
